name: Harvest Broth - Cawl Cynhaeaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove as much fat as possible from the meat.
2. Place the meat in a large saucepan and cover with water.
3. Bring to boil and skim any fat from the surface of the liquid.
4. Shell peas and beans.
5. Peel and dice carrot, onion, and turnip.
6. Add the diced vegetables (except cauliflower) to the meat.
7. Season with salt and pepper.
8. Cover and simmer slowly for 3 hours.
9. 30 minutes before serving, cut the cauliflower into florets and add to the saucepan.
10. Serve hot, garnished with sprigs of parsley.
